content.title: Test task
content.description: This is just a test task to check if the new running mechanism is working. Say 'HELLO WORLD' and finish

content.content:
HELLO WORLD! 

This is a straightforward test task to validate the new running mechanism. No code changes needed — just acknowledging receipt and confirming the agent runner is functioning correctly.

**Trade-offs:** None — this is a no-op task.

**Questions:** None. Ready to proceed once moved to `todo`.
